case_title: YU, YONG vs. JOHN DOE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YONG AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE DOES 1-30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-17-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-29-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1996, CONTINUED TO JAN-27-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE IS HEREBY TRANSFERRED TO PLAN 2. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION AND ORDER DESIGNATING CASE AS UNINSURED MOTORIST GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK; STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 01/27/97 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, YONG
ORDER BY JUDGE WICK, DESIGNATING CASE AS UNSURED MOTORIST AND TO CONTINUE STATUS CONFERENCE TO 01/27/97, FILED BY PLNT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1997, CONTINUED TO FEB-26-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF UNINSURED MOTORIST NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-26-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND FAILURE TO SUBMIT STATUS CONFERENCE REPORT REGARDING UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. HEARING SET FOR MAR-28-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
